channel.title: BeingWise — JoSAA & JEE Counselling Guides
channel.description: Honest JoSAA & CSAB counselling help for Indian engineering aspirants. Get your full choice list in the correct order from official 2023–2026 closing ranks. No spam, no guaranteed-seat lies.

item.title: Branch vs College in JEE Counselling: A Simple Decision Framework
item.description: Branch or college — which should you pick in JoSAA? A balanced, no-hype framework covering interest, careers, college tiers, CSE, branch change and minors, with a clear decision table.

item.title: CSAB Special Rounds 2026: Should You Participate?
item.description: CSAB special rounds 2026 explained in plain English — how CSAB differs from JoSAA, who should participate, the upgrade upside, the real risk of losing your JoSAA seat, and key steps.

item.title: Float vs Freeze vs Slide in JoSAA: Which to Pick After Each Round
item.description: Float vs freeze vs slide in JoSAA explained simply — what each option does, when to choose it, and what happens to your seat in the next round. With a decision table.

item.title: Are Free JEE College Predictors Safe? Spam, Lead-Selling and Staying Private
item.description: Free JEE college predictors flood you with spam calls because your rank and phone are the product. Here's how the lead-gen model works and how to predict colleges safely.

item.title: 'Guaranteed Seat' & Management-Quota Scams in JoSAA: How to Spot Them
item.description: How 'guaranteed NIT/IIT seat' and management-quota scams target JoSAA families, why they're impossible, and a red-flag checklist to protect your money.

item.title: Home-State Quota, Category & Female-Supernumerary Seats in JoSAA
item.description: A plain guide to home-state vs other-state quota at NITs, category seats (OPEN/OBC/EWS/SC/ST), female-supernumerary and PwD seats — and how each one changes your JoSAA list.

item.title: How Many Choices Should You Fill in JoSAA?
item.description: There's no cap on JoSAA choices. The real rule: fill every option you'd genuinely join, in the right order, with a safe tail. Here's how many is enough.

item.title: JoSAA Choice-Filling Mistakes That Quietly Cost Students Seats
item.description: The 10 JoSAA choice-filling mistakes that quietly cost students good seats every year — and the exact fix for each. Plain-English guide for JEE 2026 students and parents.

item.title: JoSAA Choice Filling Order 2026: The Best Preference Order
item.description: Learn the best JoSAA choice filling order for 2026 — Dream, Likely, Safe — so you never lose a better seat, with a sample ladder across IIT, NIT, IIIT and GFTI.

item.title: JoSAA Counselling 2026: The Complete Choice-Filling Guide
item.description: The full JoSAA 2026 playbook — registration, choice-filling order, mock allotment, float/freeze/slide, CSAB and reporting — explained in plain English, built on official 2023–2026 closing ranks.

item.title: JoSAA Documents & Reporting Checklist 2026: Don't Lose Your Seat
item.description: The complete JoSAA 2026 documents and reporting checklist — what to carry, the Seat Acceptance Fee, online and physical reporting steps, and the mismatches that quietly cancel allotted seats.

item.title: JoSAA Mock Seat Allotment 2026: What It Means and What to Do Next
item.description: Understand JoSAA mock seat allotment 2026 — what the mock result means, how accurate it is, why it shifts, and exactly what to fix in your choice list before you lock.

item.title: JoSAA 2026 Registration & Choice Filling: Step by Step
item.description: A clear step-by-step guide to JoSAA 2026 registration and choice filling on josaa.nic.in — what you need, how to add and order choices, portal tips, and locking.

item.title: Percentile vs Rank in JEE Main: How the Conversion Really Works
item.description: Confused by JEE Main percentile vs rank? Learn how NTA normalisation works, how to estimate your rank from percentile, CRL vs category rank, and why rank — not percentile — should drive your college planning.

item.title: Private & Deemed College Deposits: How to Avoid Forfeiting Lakhs
item.description: Booking a private or deemed college as a JoSAA backup can cost you lakhs in a forfeited deposit. Here's how refund rules work, when to pay, and how to time it right.
